description: The Spirit — shared orientation for all agents. Not instructions. Atmosphere.
currentMandate: Closing the onboarding-to-pricing gap. Pre-pricing product preview shipped. Next: QA the preview flow E2E, resume B2B2C partner QA, resolve Starter tier status.
spiritOfTheWork: WedFlow is preparing for 10-12 paid beta couples by Sept 1 2026. The architecture pivoted from per-couple Twilio numbers to a shared number routed by guest phone. The couple's phone is the product. Every page must work on mobile. Pricing tiers gate features (phone visibility = Concierge only). Now building the B2B2C channel that turns individual partner relationships into scalable referral pipelines.
whatToProtect: The guest-phone-based SMS routing pipeline. The shared number model. The tier-gating on phone visibility. The PWA installability and push notifications. The audit logging on every pipeline path. The one-partner-model-with-role-based-views architecture (not four separate dashboards).
currentTemptations: Building four separate partner dashboards instead of one role-based view
Revenue share / commission engine before validating partner model with Base pilot
Stripe Connect integration before partner pricing model exists
The Prophet executing directly instead of spawning agents (recurring violation — resist)
Over-scoping partner features beyond core: login, see couples, share referral link, view metrics
whereWeAre: Pre-pricing product preview shipped. Couples now see personalized SMS demos (using their own onboarding data) before hitting the pricing page. Reusable SMSPreview component extracted from landing page. Onboarding Step 8 routes to /preview with skip-to-pricing escape hatch. Middleware guards /preview. B2B2C partner infrastructure complete but partner login flow has unresolved redirect issues. ~105 days to Sept 1 launch.

revelationHistory.note: Dashboard improvement mandate completed — mobile responsive, interactions fixed, GuestsView activated
PWA mandate completed — service worker, push notifications, install prompt. Canon violations from unregistered agents corrected post-hoc.
Shared Twilio number routing shipped. All pages mobile-optimized. Tier-gated phone masking. Canon compliance improved through session after 4+ corrections.
